name: 20/20 Biolabs, Inc.
business: The company develops and commercializes AI-powered blood tests for early detection of cancers (OneTest for Cancer) and chronic diseases (OneTest for Longevity), and also offers BioCheck field test kits for bioterror agents and CLIAx shared laboratory services. Their tests are sold to firefighters, veterans, retail clinics, and supermarkets, using B2B and D2C strategies.
sellsTo: retail clinics (urgent care centers, pharmacy chains)
namedCustomers: Giant Food (Ahold Delhaize USA Services LLC)

exposures.sentence: We develop and commercialize AI-powered, laboratory-based blood tests for the early detection and prevention of cancers and chronic diseases.

catalysts.event: Giant Food participation agreement and statement of work
catalysts.sentence: On January 6, 2025, we entered into a participation agreement and an amended and restated statement of work No. 2. with Ahold Delhaize USA Services LLC, an affiliate of Giant of Maryland, LLC, or Giant Food, the largest supermarket chain in the Washington, D.C. region.

catalysts.event: Medicare MCED Screening Coverage Act signed into law
catalysts.sentence: On February 3, 2026, the Medicare Multi-Cancer Early Detection (MCED) Screening Coverage Act was signed into law.

catalysts.event: President Trump Executive Order on Make America Healthy Again
catalysts.sentence: On February 13, 2025, President Trump issued Executive Order 14212 Establishing the President's Make America Healthy Again Commission.
in March 2026, we entered our first agreement with a therapeutics company through an exclusive U.S. license agreement with ROKIT.

On February 9, 2026, we completed a second closing under the Note Purchase Agreement ... pursuant to which we issued a secured convertible promissory note in the principal amount of $275,000 and a warrant to purchase 62,500 shares of common stock for a total purchase price of $250,000.

catalysts.event: Private placement second closing and direct listing on Nasdaq
catalysts.sentence: On February 19, 2026, we completed a second closing under the Preferred Purchase Agreement ... pursuant to which we issued 5,000 shares of series E convertible preferred stock and the Preferred Warrant ... for a purchase price of $5,000,000, less fees of $25,000.

catalysts.event: Conversion of preferred stock upon direct listing
catalysts.sentence: On February 19, 2026, (i) an aggregate of 846,368 shares of series A preferred stock were converted into an aggregate of 846,368 shares of common stock, ... upon our direct listing on Nasdaq.

catalysts.event: Conversion of convertible promissory notes (equity crowdfunding)
catalysts.sentence: On February 25, 2026, all principal and accrued interest in the aggregate amount of $760,955 due under the convertible promissory notes described under Liquidity and Capital Resources Convertible Promissory Notes - Equity Crowdfunding below was converted into an aggregate of 91,535 shares of common stock.
OneTest for Longevity, which measures inflammatory biomarkers, that was launched in February 2026

catalysts.event: FIRE Cancer Act reintroduced in Congress
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, in February 2025, the FIRE Cancer Act was reintroduced in Congress to provide $700 million in federal funding (through FEMA) for MCED testing.
